title: Constitution versioning + diff
description: Add constitution bump and diff commands. Track constitution versions with semantic versioning. Store snapshots in .spec-graph/.constitution-snapshot.json. Add constitution_diff to change.sync_impact to show which rules changed and what needs re-verification. Enables teams to see constitution evolution and identify artifacts that need re-validation after rule changes.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed, state primed
